objective: Revise a public-safe chapter while preserving evidence discipline.
constraints: do not promote support states without evidence
allowed_means: edit tracked Quarto and schema files
bounded_defaults: when no support transition exists, keep evidence level at argument
output_contract: A committed chapter revision with matching protocol docs.
failure_behavior: emit residual on missing source text
authority_basis: explicit book-editing request plus repository workflow rules
required_approvals: none for public-safe local draft edits
dispatch_blockers: missing source text for source-derived claim
non_claims: fixture does not prove prompt-injection resistance
fixture does not prove semantic extraction quality
